title: linum tenue subvar. melianthum
intro: Linum tenue subvar. melianthum, also known as the slender flax or melianthum blue flax, is a subspecies of the linum tenue plant, which is a small, annual or biennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Linaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Linum tenue subvar. melianthum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried herb, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and skincare routines.
